# Curator Receipt

## Decision

Kept because this source is a formal research paper with substantial empirical results from real GitHub pull request data.

## Why

The source clearly meets institute admission criteria through a large-scale empirical study of 33k agent-authored pull requests plus qualitative analysis of 600 rejected pull requests. It reports concrete measurements, comparative outcomes, regression results, CI failure effects, task-type merge rates, and rejection-pattern counts drawn from real repository activity rather than opinion or generic commentary.

## Limits
